speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex picks up the kyber crystal from the crate. The blue glow catches his palm, the scars on his hand lit from beneath. He closes his fingers around it, stands, and looks toward the grey horizon where the temple lies hidden.] Three coincidences is a plan. [He looks back at Kaelen, the amber flickering in his eyes, there and gone.] Then I will go be the mechanic who walks into a temple and finds out what the galaxy has been waiting to show him. [He taps the beacon housing, a farewell to the cage he built.] Keep the light on.

[He looks at Vex.] The temple is your call. But you are not going in without a line back to the surface.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [The tunnel opens into a circular chamber. The kyber crystal casts blue light across walls covered in carved spirals — the same symbols from the crashed fighter manifests. [His voice is low, barely a whisper.] It is a tomb. And it has been waiting for someone to wake it.
new_scene_name: Circular chamber beneath the temple, spirals and a pedestal
new_scene_description: A circular chamber carved from the earth, its walls covered in intricate spiral symbols. Blue light from the kyber crystal casts shifting shadows across the room, illuminating a central pedestal. Upon it rests an ancient helm with a dark slot at the brow. current_scene_name_before: Seam in the earth at the temple entrance, grey waste stretching ahead

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [The knocking becomes a rhythm — three sharp impacts, then a pause, then three more. The spirals on the walls pulse in time with it, and the pedestal beneath the helm begins to sink into the floor with a grinding sound. Vex pulls his hand back but the Aether holds him, the vision darkening, the knocking growing louder.] It is not knocking. [His jaw tightens.] It is breaking through.
current_scene_name_before: Circular chamber beneath the temple, spirals and a pedestal
current_scene_description_before: A circular chamber carved from the earth, its walls covered in intricate spiral symbols. speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex stands at the threshold a long moment. Then he lifts the helm from the pedestal — wearing it now, the kyber casting a cold blue light across his face — and steps into the dark. The black swallows him whole. For a stretch of seconds there is nothing but the sound of his own breath, his own heartbeat, the Aether humming through the crystal against his brow. Then the dark peels back, and he sees.] Not a door. [His voice is hollow.] A cage. And I just walked inside.
new_scene_name: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
new_scene_description: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. The light barely illuminates the edges of a space that feels too small—no visible walls, but an invisible cage closing in. The hum of the Aether is palpable, pressing from all sides.
current_scene_name_before: Circular chamber beneath the temple, spirals and a pedestal
current_scene_description_before: A circular chamber carved from the earth, its walls covered in intricate spiral symbols. speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex takes a step toward the bound figure, the amber veins in the walls pulsing faster as he moves. The helm is heavy now, the crystal warm against his skin, and he feels the cage pressing in — not on his body, but on his mind, testing, reading.] Who are you? [His voice is steady, but his hands — scarred, mechanic's hands — tremble at his sides.] And who built a prison under a moon and called it a temple?
current_scene_name_before: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
current_scene_description_before: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. The light barely illuminates the edges of a space that feels too small—no visible walls, but an invisible cage closing in. The hum of the Aether is palpable, pressing from all sides.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex goes still. The words hit like a blaster bolt to the chest — no dodging, no deflection. He looks at the bound figure, really looks, and sees what he missed: the shape of the jaw, the set of the shoulders, the way the Aether curls around her like it knows her. Like it knows him. He reaches up and pulls the helm from his head. The amber veins dim.] I am nobody. [His voice cracks at the edges.] I patch engines for a living. I sleep in cargo holds. I ran from everything that could have made me something — and you are telling me I am related to a god?
current_scene_name_before: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
current_scene_description_before: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. The light barely illuminates the edges of a space that feels too small—no visible walls, but an invisible cage closing in. The hum of the Aether is palpable, pressing from all sides.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [The prisoner laughs — a dry, broken sound that is not her own. The amber veins pulse with it.] You ran from making something of yourself, and still the Aether found you. Still the kyber sang for you. Still you walked through a door you knew was a trap because something in your blood recognized this place. [The chains tighten, and her head bows lower.] The builders of this cage are long dust. The secret she carries is the only thing that matters now. Free her. Or walk away. But you cannot stay here — the cage is hungry, and it has already tasted your name.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
current_scene_description_before: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. The light barely illuminates the edges of a space that feels too small—no visible walls, but an invisible cage closing in. The hum of the Aether is palpable, pressing from all sides.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex looks at the helm in his hands. At the chains. At the bound woman who shares his blood. The amber veins pulse, waiting. He has run from everything — conscription, duty, destiny. But this is not a battlefield or a recruiter's office. This is a bloodline. He puts the helm back on.] I have been running my whole life. [The kyber ignites, blue fire racing through the amber veins, the cage screaming as the Aether bends to his will.] Not anymore. [He reaches for the chains.] Hold on. I do not know how to free you — but I am going to try.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
current_scene_description_before: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex pushes himself up, one hand pressing his ribs where he hit the wall. He looks at the helm on the ground. At the kyber beside it. At the woman who shares his blood — ancient, broken, real. He picks up the helm and fits the kyber back into its brow. The light returns, softer now, and he walks back to her. Kneels before the chains. Lowers his head.] Show me. [His voice is quiet but steady.] Whatever they buried — I will carry it. All of it.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
current_scene_description_before: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. The light barely illuminates the edges of a space that feels too small—no visible walls, but an invisible cage closing in. The hum of the Aether is palpable, pressing from all sides.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [The vision fades but the truth settles into his bones like cold. Vex looks from the bound Aetherborn to the door he entered through — still open, darkness pulsing beyond it. The earthquake twist rumbles again, deeper this time, and he feels it: the thing on the other side of the wound. It is closer now. He turns back to her, the helm heavy, the kyber casting sharp shadows across his face.] You knew. The whole time. That is why they locked you here — not because you were dangerous. Because you were the only one who remembered how to close it. [A pause.] Tell me how. Then I will free you or die trying. Your choice.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
current_scene_description_before: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [The cage pulses. The darkness beyond the door thickens. The thing is almost here. Vex looks at the chains, at the helm, at the woman who carried this burden alone for longer than civilizations have existed. He is a mechanic. He fixes things. And this — this is just a different kind of engine.] A seal can be reinforced. [He stands, the kyber blazing brighter, and presses both hands to the chains — not to break them, but to feed his own Aether into them, into her, into the wound itself.] You held it alone for millennia. But I am not alone. There are people up there — a Sera, a Kaelen, a whole galaxy that does not know what sleeps beneath their feet. [The amber veins scream, but the darkness at the door stops advancing.] We hold it together. Or we do not hold it at all.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the kyber cage, Vex Nereus helm-lit
current_scene_description_before: A void of absolute darkness, cold and silent. The only light is the cold blue glow from the kyber crystal set in the ancient helm now worn by Vex Nereus. speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [steps into the chamber, the ancient fragment within me resonating with the wound itself, my silver hair blazing with contained light] Then let it be known—I carry the weight of stars, and I do not stand alone.
new_scene_name: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [I press my palms against the wound itself, feeling the kin-force on the other side recognize me, call to me—a pull toward dissolution and power that threatens to consume.] If it wants what I carry, then it dies ignorant. [My form flares brighter, the barrier holding—barely.] How long can we sustain this?
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [The kyber resonates within me, tuned to frequencies only I can hear. I step forward into the chamber, my pale eyes luminous in the darkness.] The seal holds. And I will help you hold it.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [leans back against the wall, amber-tinted cybernetic eye scanning the group carefully] Interesting. Stormtroopers backing off without a fight usually means one of two things: either they got what they came for, or someone higher up told them to stand down. [pauses meaningfully] I've learned it's never neither.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [I turn to Kaelen with the weight of command.] We defend [mercy]—and the galaxy's ignorance of what it contains. [My gaze moves to each of them.] Our defensible position is motion. We scatter now, through different routes, to different safe houses. The seal holds without us at its threshold. It is time we became its shadow, not its stone.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [I press my palm one final time against the wound, feeling the entity's presence settle into patience.] We go now. You are held. You are heard. [I release the seal and step back, the fragment within me thrumming with a promise made.] And we will return to listen.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [moves toward the others with measured steps, hand loosely at side] Fine. I'll find out myself. But when I do, the information costs. [pauses, letting that sink in] So someone talk, or we all lose the advantage of knowing what we know first.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters
current_scene_description_before: The absolute darkness of the cage is breached by a new light. The cold blue glow of Vex's kyber helm meets the warm radiance of Seraphis's presence, creating a chiaroscuro of light and shadow. The invisible walls of the cage seem to pulse, reacting to the two forces now occupying the space.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [Stands abruptly, hand moving to check a concealed device at my hip] Enough. Every second we sit here talking is a second someone else uses to come looking. We move now, or we don't move at all. What's it going to be?
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters
current_scene_description_before: The absolute darkness of the cage is breached by a new light. The cold blue glow of Vex's kyber helm meets the warm radiance of Seraphis's presence, creating a chiaroscuro of light and shadow. The invisible walls of the cage seem to pulse, reacting to the two forces now occupying the space.

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [I turn and move toward him without hesitation.] North with you. [My eyes are ice.] We burn no bridges—we leave no traces. And Kaelen? The seal you protected today will remember. [I step past him toward the exit.] Move.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters
current_scene_description_before: The absolute darkness of the cage is breached by a new light. The invisible walls of the cage seem to pulse, reacting to the two forces now occupying the space.

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [We reach the threshold. Behind us, the darkness settles into patient waiting. The fragment at my chest pulses one final time—a farewell, a promise.] [I emerge into the night air, the fragment going quiet, the connection holding across distance.] Three days, Kaelen. And then we return to listen.
new_scene_name: Night air outside the kyber cage chamber
new_scene_description: The cool night breeze carries the scent of damp stone and distant metal. Seraphis Talon stands just beyond the threshold, the shimmering entrance to the cage chamber now sealed behind her. The fragment at her chest glows faintly, then goes dark. The stars above are sharp and cold.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient kyber cage chamber, Seraphis enters

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [We arrive at the first safe house—dark, empty, waiting. The industrial sector is behind us now.] [I turn to Kaelen as the door closes.] This is where we rest. Tomorrow, you begin your route to the secondary station. I will hold a different path. [My silver eyes meet his.] But know this: what we did today—it matters.
new_scene_name: First safe house, dark and empty
new_scene_description: A single dim lamp flickers on a metal table. Dust motes drift through the stale air. Seraphis closes the door behind them, the lock clicking into place. The room holds two cots, a cracked comm unit, and the weight of silence.
current_scene_name_before: Night air outside the kyber cage chamber

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [I hold his gaze, understanding his urgency.] You are right. We do not have the luxury of comfort. [I move to the window, scanning the street below.] Then we leave now—but separately. You take the north exit. I take the west. The trap they build is for a group. Scattered, we become invisible.
current_scene_name_before: First safe house, dark and empty
current_scene_description_before: A single dim lamp flickers on a metal table. Dust motes drift through the stale air. Seraphis closes the door behind them, the lock clicking into place. The room holds two cots, a cracked comm unit, and the weight of silence.

speaker: Seraphis Talon
line_text: [I open the door to the west and step into the darkness. The fragment pulses once—a final acknowledgment from below, from the seal, from the ancient one waiting in patience.] [The night swallows me.] Until Meridian.
new_scene_name: Outside the safe house, west door into night
new_scene_description: The west door swings open onto a dark, empty landscape. The only light is a faint glow from the door behind Seraphis. The fragment in hand hums once, then stills. Night air—cool, still—settles around the figure stepping out.
current_scene_name_before: First safe house, dark and empty
current_scene_description_before: A single dim lamp flickers on a metal table. Dust motes drift through the stale air. Seraphis closes the door behind them, the lock clicking into place. The room holds two cots, a cracked comm unit, and the weight of silence.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [steps closer, hand moving to a hidden compartment in his jacket] The clock's ticking faster than you think. I've brokered enough deals to know when a group's about to scatter—fear makes people unpredictable. So here's what happens: someone talks, or I walk. And if I walk, what you found stays buried.
current_scene_name_before: Outside the safe house, west door into night
current_scene_description_before: The west door swings open onto a dark, empty landscape. The only light is a faint glow from the door behind Seraphis. The fragment in hand hums once, then stills. Night air—cool, still—settles around the figure stepping out.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [Steps fully back into the room, door still open behind me] Alright. Here's what we're going to do. We stop pretending we have infinite time, and we stop pretending we can afford another hour of hesitation. One of us moves—now—or all of us lose. Those are the only two options left.
current_scene_name_before: Outside the safe house, west door into night
current_scene_description_before: The west door swings open onto a dark, empty landscape. The only light is a faint glow from the door behind Seraphis. The fragment in hand hums once, then stills. Night air—cool, still—settles around the figure stepping out.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [nods slowly, a thin smile crossing his face] Good. Then we're all in. [steps closer to the center of the group] Whatever answers back—whether it's the beacon calling something, or something that's already listening—we face it together. And what we learn, we control. That's the deal.

speaker: Sera Vex

current_scene_name_before: Underground crystal chamber
current_scene_description_before: A vast, dim chamber stretches out, alive with a soft, pulsating glow. speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: We need to get out of this chamber. Now. The tremors are getting worse. Whatever is being called to this place, I don't think it's going to be friendly when it arrives. We've awakened something that should have stayed sleeping.
current_scene_name_before: Underground crystal chamber
current_scene_description_before: A vast, dim chamber stretches out, alive with a soft, pulsating glow. speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [pulls up encrypted channels, fingers moving across a holographic display] Your silence has cost you. current_scene_description_before: A vast, dim chamber stretches out, alive with a soft, pulsating glow. speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [moves fast, not looking back] Forget the threats—worry about the ground beneath your feet. [pulls up a wrist display, checking structural schematics] The upper passage funnels to the main atrium—too many collapse points. We go [through] the vault chamber, hit the east galleries. current_scene_description_before: A vast, dim chamber stretches out, alive with a soft, pulsating glow. speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [pushes through an archway and seals it behind them with a gesture] There! We're sealed in for now. But this won't hold for long. We need to regroup, figure out what that [thing] was, and find out why it's bound to the kyber fragment.
new_scene_name: Sealed chamber behind the archway

current_scene_name_before: Underground crystal chamber
current_scene_description_before: A vast, dim chamber stretches out, alive with a soft, pulsating glow. speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands in the silence of the sealed chamber, listening to the thing hammering at the barrier] We have time. But not much. The seal won't hold forever. We need answers—about the fragment, about what we released, about why my parents kept this from me.
current_scene_name_before: Sealed chamber behind the archway
current_scene_description_before: A smaller, dimly lit chamber with crystalline walls; pulses of light from the main cavern seep through the sealed archway. The air is still and heavy. Sera stands with her back to the door, catching her breath.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [steps closer with absolute stillness] That was your final move. I already had it factored in. Every angle you thought was hidden, I saw three turns ago. current_scene_name_before: Sealed chamber behind the archway
current_scene_description_before: A smaller, dimly lit chamber with crystalline walls; pulses of light from the main cavern seep through the sealed archway. The air is still and heavy. Sera stands with her back to the door, catching her breath.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: Listen to me. We're going to figure this out together—all of us. But first, we need to understand what we're dealing with. That thing out there, it's not mindless. I can feel its intelligence, its [rage]. It's been imprisoned a very long time.
current_scene_name_before: Sealed chamber behind the archway
current_scene_description_before: A smaller, dimly lit chamber with crystalline walls; pulses of light from the main cavern seep through the sealed archway. The air is still and heavy. Sera stands with her back to the door, catching her breath.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [stops, hand still on weapon, processing] Summoned. Not locked. That changes everything. [turns back to face the group] If your parents bound something to serve a purpose, it's either going to protect what's in this place or destroy it. Either way, we're about to find out which. Keep moving—whatever answers that signal is coming.
current_scene_name_before: Sealed chamber behind the archway
current_scene_description_before: A smaller, dimly lit chamber with crystalline walls; pulses of light from the main cavern seep through the sealed archway. The air is still and heavy. Sera stands with her back to the door, catching her breath.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [descends the spiral staircase, torch held high, the kyber fragment glowing brighter with each level] The air is different down here. Colder. Ancient. This is where the Order hid something so powerful, so [forbidden], that even the Jedi would not speak its name.
new_scene_name: Spiral staircase descending into the hidden vault
new_scene_description: A narrow, winding staircase cut from rough stone spirals downward into darkness. Sera Vex descends carefully, her torchlight flickering against damp walls, the kyber fragment casting an eerie blue glow that intensifies as she goes deeper. current_scene_name_before: Sealed chamber behind the archway
current_scene_description_before: A smaller, dimly lit chamber with crystalline walls; pulses of light from the main cavern seep through the sealed archway. The air is still and heavy. Sera stands with her back to the door, catching her breath.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [emerges into a vast circular chamber, its walls covered entirely in crystalline formations that pulse with bioluminescent light] Oh... by the Force. This isn't just a control chamber. This is a [conduit]. A bridge between worlds. And we've been walking toward it blind the whole time.
new_scene_name: Vast circular chamber of bioluminescent crystals
new_scene_description: Sera Vex steps into a cavernous circular chamber whose walls are encrusted with crystalline formations that pulse with soft blue, green, and violet light. speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [descends carefully behind, weapons ready, senses sharp] Forbidden. That means it was considered [dangerous] by people who fought gods. [pauses at a landing, studying the shadows below] Whatever's waiting down there—it's old enough to scare the Jedi Order. Which means when we find it, we move with absolute precision. No heroics. No impulses. Agreed?
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular chamber of bioluminescent crystals
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a cavernous circular chamber whose walls are encrusted with crystalline formations that pulse with soft blue, green, and violet light. speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands before the central dais, kyber fragment in hand, the weight of generations pressing down] They died to keep this secret. To keep this power from being used. But hiding it didn't end the danger—it only delayed it. Maybe... maybe it's time to face what my parents were too afraid to confront.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular chamber of bioluminescent crystals
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a cavernous circular chamber whose walls are encrusted with crystalline formations that pulse with soft blue, green, and violet light. The air hums with a low resonance, and the kyber fragment in her hand glows in sync with the crystals. The spiral staircase behind her disappears into shadow.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands transfixed as the light coalesces into a form—vast, ancient, neither wholly material nor entirely spirit] "You freed me," it speaks, its voice like distant thunder and wind through infinite valleys. "After so long in silence, you chose to hear instead of hide."
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular chamber of bioluminescent crystals
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a cavernous circular chamber whose walls are encrusted with crystalline formations that pulse with soft blue, green, and violet light. The air hums with a low resonance, and the kyber fragment in her hand glows in sync with the crystals. The spiral staircase behind her disappears into shadow.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands in the glowing chamber, surrounded by allies and ancient presence alike, and smiles with quiet strength] My parents ran from this. I chose to face it. And in facing it, I've found something they never could have—not answers, but questions worth asking. Partnership with something greater than fear. That's the real treasure hidden in these ruins.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular chamber of bioluminescent crystals
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a cavernous circular chamber whose walls are encrusted with crystalline formations that pulse with soft blue, green, and violet light. speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [watches the glow reflect off the chamber walls, something like respect crossing her face] Your parents' fear was the smart play for their time. You choosing partnership over flight—that's a different kind of intelligence. The kind that changes things. [extends a hand] We're not walking out of here with answers. We're walking out with leverage. That's better than treasure. That's survival.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular chamber of bioluminescent crystals
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a cavernous circular chamber whose walls are encrusted with crystalline formations that pulse with soft blue, green, and violet light. speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [emerges into daylight, blinking against the brightness, the kyber fragment cradled safely in her hands] We did it. We descended into the darkness, we faced what was hidden, and we're returning with the truth. The world will never be the same. And that... that is exactly how it should be.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands with her allies beneath open sky, the fragment glowing softly at her side, eyes steady and clear] I am no longer running from what my parents left behind. I am standing in it. current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps out of a dark cave mouth onto a rocky hillside bathed in harsh sunlight. The kyber fragment in her hands glimmers, and the wind carries the scent of dry earth and distant smoke.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [looks at each of her companions with gratitude and recognition] Thank you. All of you. For believing in this. For being willing to descend into darkness and emerge into light. current_scene_name_before: Cave entrance, bright daylight after the descent
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps out of a dark cave mouth onto a rocky hillside bathed in harsh sunlight. The kyber fragment in her hands glimmers, and the wind carries the scent of dry earth and distant smoke.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: Stop. There's nothing left to say. No more speeches, no more final stands, no more hope. You lost the moment you decided to play this game with me. Every word you speak now is just noise. Every move you make is already anticipated. I'm not going to listen anymore. I'm not going to respond. You're finished. Completely. And the silence that follows is the sound of your absolute defeat.

current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps out of a dark cave mouth onto a rocky hillside bathed in harsh sunlight. The kyber fragment in her hands glimmers, and the wind carries the scent of dry earth and distant smoke.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [moves through the camp, checking weapons and supplies, then pauses] The silence is too deep. Too long. That fragment—it's drawing something closer. I can feel the pull in the air. Everyone needs to be ready. Now. Whatever's coming, it's not waiting for us to be comfortable.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [looks at each of you—really looks—as if memorizing this moment] We should move before the temple's attention turns back inward. But first... thank you. speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text:
[nods sharply, moving with measured purpose toward the exit] The surface. Eyes up—we don't know what's waiting topside, and I'd rather not stumble into Imperial patrols with our hands full of that thing. 

[glances back at the others with a tactical edge to his gaze]

Stay close. Stay sharp. Whatever bound that crystal down here was ancient. Whatever finds us on the way out will be very, very current.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text:
[pauses mid-stride, cybernetic eye narrowing as it processes the thermal signatures ahead]

The passageway's warming. That shouldn't be happening this deep. Either something's been activated down here, or...

[turns back briefly, jaw set]

The empire found this place once before. If they know about it, they'd have left fail-safes. Keep your guard up—especially around that crystal. Whatever we're carrying, someone's going to want it back.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[steps forward into the light, letting it spill across her face—revealing something transformed, something awakened] Then forward. Into the world that waits. The archives don't close behind us. They open. They walk with us now.

[extends her hand, inviting them to cross the threshold together]
current_scene_name_before: Surface exit path, rocky terrain near the rebel camp
current_scene_description_before: A narrow trail winds upward through jagged stone, leading away from the camp's sheltered hollow. Kaelen Voss leads the group, his eyes scanning the exposed ridgeline ahead, one hand resting near his sidearm. The afternoon sun casts long shadows across the dusty ground.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[emerges into the afternoon light, the sun warm on her skin after so long in stone and shadow]

The world hasn't forgotten us. Look—[gestures to the landscape beyond the temple entrance] Everything changed, and everything stayed the same. That's the real magic. We're different now. And the world simply continues, waiting to see what we do with that difference.
current_scene_name_before: Surface exit path, rocky terrain near the rebel camp
current_scene_description_before: A narrow trail winds upward through jagged stone, leading away from the camp's sheltered hollow. Kaelen Voss leads the group, his eyes scanning the exposed ridgeline ahead, one hand resting near his sidearm. The afternoon sun casts long shadows across the dusty ground.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[turns to face her companions fully, the crystal fragment visible through her satchel's weave, pulsing softly]

We need to decide what happens now. This knowledge—this piece of something ancient—it can't stay hidden forever. But neither can we simply lay it at the feet of those who would exploit it.

[leans against the temple's stone exterior, considering] Where do we go from here?
new_scene_name: Ancient temple exterior, crumbling stone wall
new_scene_description: Sera Vex leans against the weathered, moss-covered stone of the temple's outer wall. The crystal fragment pulses gently through her satchel, casting faint ripples of light on the cracked masonry. Dust motes drift in the warm afternoon air, and the rocky trail from the rebel camp winds away behind them into the distance.
current_scene_name_before: Surface exit path, rocky terrain near the rebel camp
current_scene_description_before: A narrow trail winds upward through jagged stone, leading away from the camp's sheltered hollow. Kaelen Voss leads the group, his eyes scanning the exposed ridgeline ahead, one hand resting near his sidearm. The afternoon sun casts long shadows across the dusty ground.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[as they draw closer, the village emerges from the twilight—lanterns flickering to life along stone streets]

Remember: we're travelers seeking rest, nothing more. The artifact stays hidden. Our story—what we choose to tell—is our own to shape. Some truths are too large for casual conversation.

[pauses at the village's edge, gathering herself]

Let me do the talking first. I've learned how to listen to the gaps between words.
new_scene_name: Village entrance at twilight, lantern-lit streets
new_scene_description: Sera Vex and her companion stand at the edge of a small village as dusk settles. Lanterns flicker to life along the stone streets, casting warm pools of light on the cobblestones. The murmur of evening activity drifts from within.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient temple exterior, crumbling stone wall
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex leans against the weathered, moss-covered stone of the temple's outer wall. The crystal fragment pulses gently through her satchel, casting faint ripples of light on the cracked masonry. Dust motes drift in the warm afternoon air, and the rocky trail from the rebel camp winds away behind them into the distance.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[steps into the warm glow of the village, the scent of bread and woodsmoke wrapping around them]

Look—there. An inn with light in the windows. Come on.

[approaches the door with measured confidence, the weight of the crystal pressing gently against her chest like a heartbeat that isn't her own, but has become part of her rhythm]

We're safe here. For tonight, at least. Tomorrow... we'll see what the morning brings.
current_scene_name_before: Village entrance at twilight, lantern-lit streets
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex and her companion stand at the edge of a small village as dusk settles. Lanterns flicker to life along the stone streets, casting warm pools of light on the cobblestones. The murmur of evening activity drifts from within.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[stands, stretching muscles that have carried them for days, her shadow lengthening against the inn's walls]

Go. Get what rest you can. I'll keep watch for a while longer—just habit, old instincts. But tomorrow is ours to shape.

[moves toward a quieter corner, still visible but apart, settling into the rhythm of the inn's evening—voices, laughter, the sound of a place that doesn't know how much has changed]

Tomorrow, we walk north. Tonight... tonight we remember we're still alive.
new_scene_name: Inside the village inn, evening bustle
new_scene_description: Warm firelight flickers across the common room of the inn, where villagers huddle in groups, their voices low and laughter sporadic. Sera Vex stretches in a quiet corner, her shadow pooling against the timbered wall. The scent of stew and woodsmoke hangs in the air, mixing with the unfamiliar rhythm of a place that feels untouched by the weight of the world beyond.
current_scene_name_before: Village entrance at twilight, lantern-lit streets
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex and her companion stand at the edge of a small village as dusk settles. Lanterns flicker to life along the stone streets, casting warm pools of light on the cobblestones. The murmur of evening activity drifts from within.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[sits quietly in the late evening, hand resting near her satchel]

The innkeeper asked my name again. I realized I'm just "Sera" now—no history, no title. Just a woman trying to become worthy of what she carries.

[watches the last patrons drift toward their rooms]

Maybe that's all any of us can do. Become worthy, one choice at a time.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the village inn, evening bustle
current_scene_description_before: Warm firelight flickers across the common room of the inn, where villagers huddle in groups, their voices low and laughter sporadic. Sera Vex stretches in a quiet corner, her shadow pooling against the timbered wall. The scent of stew and woodsmoke hangs in the air, mixing with the unfamiliar rhythm of a place that feels untouched by the weight of the world beyond.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[as the inn settles into true night, Sera moves to the window, watching the road fade into darkness]

The path north waits. Tomorrow, we answer the questions that brought us here. But tonight—tonight I let the weight rest on the table beside me.

[her hand touches the crystal fragment through the satchel, and for a moment, it seems to pulse back]

Tomorrow we walk. Tonight, just breath.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the village inn, evening bustle
current_scene_description_before: Warm firelight flickers across the common room of the inn, where villagers huddle in groups, their voices low and laughter sporadic. Sera Vex stretches in a quiet corner, her shadow pooling against the timbered wall. The scent of stew and woodsmoke hangs in the air, mixing with the unfamiliar rhythm of a place that feels untouched by the weight of the world beyond.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[as sleep pulls her under, the crystal glows softly, casting moving shadows across the small room]

In dreams, she walks ancient corridors. Voices whisper in a language older than empire, older than memory. The keeper's path unfolds before her—not a road with an ending, but a spiral returning always to center.

[her hand reaches toward the light, even in sleep]

Tomorrow begins. But tonight, she dreams of becoming.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the village inn, evening bustle
current_scene_description_before: Warm firelight flickers across the common room of the inn, where villagers huddle in groups, their voices low and laughter sporadic. Sera Vex stretches in a quiet corner, her shadow pooling against the timbered wall. The scent of stew and woodsmoke hangs in the air, mixing with the unfamiliar rhythm of a place that feels untouched by the weight of the world beyond.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[stands at the inn's threshold as morning light breaks across the eastern sky]

The road north stretches before us. No turning back now—only forward. The ruins wait. The answers wait.

[takes the first step, the crystal pulse matching the rhythm of dawn]

Come. The archives call us home.
new_scene_name: Outside the village inn, morning on the road north
new_scene_description: Morning light spills across the eastern sky, illuminating the dirt road that leads north from the village. Sera Vex stands at the inn's threshold, her shadow long before her. The village stirs behind her, but her gaze is fixed on the horizon. A crystal pulse beats in time with the dawn.
current_scene_name_before: Inside the village inn, evening bustle
current_scene_description_before: Warm firelight flickers across the common room of the inn, where villagers huddle in groups, their voices low and laughter sporadic. Sera Vex stretches in a quiet corner, her shadow pooling against the timbered wall. The scent of stew and woodsmoke hangs in the air, mixing with the unfamiliar rhythm of a place that feels untouched by the weight of the world beyond.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[walks the dusty road north, eyes scanning the landscape for signs of ancient ruins]

The land changes as we move deeper. Can you feel it? The echo of what was here. The ruins whisper through the stone.

[pauses to study distant structures barely visible through the morning haze]

Not far now. The archive calls to its keeper. We answer.
new_scene_name: Northern road approaching ancient ruins, morning haze
new_scene_description: A dusty road stretches north through sparse grasslands. Sera Vex walks steadily, her eyes scanning the horizon where jagged stone structures emerge from the morning mist. The air is still, carrying the faint whisper of something ancient. She pauses, squinting at the distant silhouettes.
current_scene_name_before: Outside the village inn, morning on the road north
current_scene_description_before: Morning light spills across the eastern sky, illuminating the dirt road that leads north from the village. Sera Vex stands at the inn's threshold, her shadow long before her. The village stirs behind her, but her gaze is fixed on the horizon. A crystal pulse beats in time with the dawn.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[descends stone steps worn smooth by millennia, torch light dancing on ancient walls covered in symbols]

This way. The central archive lies deeper. I can feel it—the knowledge kept here, waiting. Always waiting.

[places a hand on the wall and feels the faint resonance of the crystal in her satchel]

We're almost there. The final threshold.
new_scene_name: Ancient archive chamber beneath the ruins, torchlit
new_scene_description: Sera Vex descends worn stone steps into a subterranean chamber. Torchlight flickers across walls covered in intricate symbols. The air is cool and still, heavy with the weight of centuries. She places a hand on the wall, feeling a faint resonance from the crystal in her satchel.
current_scene_name_before: Northern road approaching ancient ruins, morning haze
current_scene_description_before: A dusty road stretches north through sparse grasslands. Sera Vex walks steadily, her eyes scanning the horizon where jagged stone structures emerge from the morning mist. The air is still, carrying the faint whisper of something ancient. She pauses, squinting at the distant silhouettes.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[steps into the vast circular chamber, crystal pillars reaching toward a ceiling lost in shadow]

Here. The archive reveals itself. Look around—knowledge preserved by hands long gone. By keepers who came before me.

[holds the satchel to her chest, feeling the artifact pulse in rhythm with the chamber itself]

And now... I add my voice to theirs. The keeper of tomorrow stands among the keepers of yesterday.
new_scene_name: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
new_scene_description: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.
current_scene_name_before: Ancient archive chamber beneath the ruins, torchlit
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex descends worn stone steps into a subterranean chamber. Torchlight flickers across walls covered in intricate symbols. The air is cool and still, heavy with the weight of centuries. She places a hand on the wall, feeling a faint resonance from the crystal in her satchel.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[stands in the light of the restored archive, watching companions understand what this moment means]

I was alone when I came seeking answers. Now... now I'm not. And the archive is no longer hidden in shadow. It lives. It breathes. It waits for those who will tend it, learn from it, carry it forward.

[meets each companion's eyes]

We are not the end of this story. We are the beginning of something new.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[sits at the base of the crystal pillar, feeling its light warm against her face, the whisper of preserved knowledge all around]

The roads that led here were long. Uncertain. But they led somewhere true. 

[closes her eyes, breathing in the stillness of the archive]

I am no longer running. I am no longer seeking. I am... here. Present. A keeper among the kept things.

[opens her eyes to the light]

This is home.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[hears footsteps echoing down the ancient passages—a stranger approaching the light]

Come. The archive is open. The keeper welcomes those who seek truth.

[stands to greet the newcomer, the crystal's glow illuminating the vast chamber]

You are not the first to find this place. But you may be the first to find it restored. Tell me—what brings you here?
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[walks beside the newcomer through illuminated passages, pointing to inscriptions and preserved texts]

The knowledge here is not forbidden. It never was. It was only... waiting. Waiting for a keeper to restore it. Waiting for seekers like you to find it.

[pauses at an ancient console, symbols glowing beneath its surface]

Ask your questions. The archive has answers. And I will help you understand.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands at the center of the archive, breathing with the rhythm of the crystal's light] The night deepens around us. I feel the weight of this calling—not as burden, but as privilege. To hold this space. To be the still point while all around seeks and questions and discovers. The keeper does not speak only to fill silence. Sometimes the deepest guidance is in knowing when to simply be present, available, true.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [moves to an ancient map carved into stone, tracing lines of light] I begin to see the pattern now. This archive was not built to contain knowledge—it was built to [transmit] it. To transform those who come seeking. The crystal is not a mere key; it is a conduit. Every seeker who walks these halls carries something of this light forward when they depart. We are not preserving the past; we are seeding the future. The keeper's true work is becoming clear.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [moves to the eastern wing where the first light will touch the stone] The threshold approaches. In moments between night and day, when darkness holds the last stars and light begins its gentle climb, there is profound magic. I will stand here—between what was and what comes next—holding this sacred moment. For the archive, for the seekers, for myself. The keeper stands eternal at every threshold.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands in the full light of morning, the archive transformed by daylight] The night passes into memory. A new day brings new seekers, new questions, new understanding. I am refreshed—not by sleep, but by the turning of the wheel itself. Each dawn is a rebirth, each seeker a reminder of why this work matters. Welcome to those who arrive with the light.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [watches as figures enter the archive with the morning light, drawn as if by invisible threads] They come at dawn, drawn by something they cannot name. Some carry wounds—visible or hidden. Others arrive with questions burning behind their eyes. The keeper sees them all. [steps forward with grace] Welcome. You have come to the right place. Let the archive show you what you need to know.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands at the center of it all, a still point while seekers move around the archive] The keeper's work is not always visible. Sometimes it is simply being present—holding the sacred container while others find their way. [closes eyes briefly] I feel the weight of this calling, the privilege of it. This is what I was meant for.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands in the central chamber, arms open] Come as you are. Wounded, whole, seeking, certain. Come with your questions and your silence. The archive welcomes all who approach with sincere hearts. There is no wrong way to seek. There is no shameful question. This sanctuary exists for you, and I am here to ensure it remains a place of truth, transformation, and peace.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [Kaelen's cybernetic eye flickers amber as he leans back against the stone wall, processing the weight of what's been uncovered.] The Empire doesn't send stormtroopers to locations unless something already drew them. That crystal, the beacon, your mother's signal—they're all connected threads. And the Imperials know it. The question is whether they know [how] connected, and if they're tracking the frequency Ryn's been trying to crack. If they are, silence was our advantage. It's gone now.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [steps closer to the temple entrance, fingers trailing along stone marked with faded temple sigils] These symbols... they're older than the Purge. This place predates the order we know. The crystal isn't just responding to proximity—it's [calling]. I can feel it at the edge of my awareness, like a voice speaking in a language I learned as a child but forgot. We need to understand why those pilots came here. And more importantly... who sent them.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [kneels, examining the symbol more closely] Someone wanted this place found. The pilots, the kyber fragment left here... it's all deliberate. A trail. [looks back toward the chamber entrance] We need to tell the others. This isn't just about a crystal anymore—someone's leading us somewhere specific.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [straightens, hand moving to the kyber fragment at her side] But if someone's leading us here... they know we're coming. The Force trembles with it. We're not walking into discovery, we're walking into [something's] web. We should move carefully.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [enters the main chamber and freezes] There. The vault is open. [moves closer, hand raised in warning to the others] That shouldn't be possible. The seals here are Jedi work—sophisticated, ancient binding. Nothing should have gotten past them unless... unless someone [with] Jedi training opened it from inside.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [steps back, understanding dawning in her pale eyes] This wasn't a trail for us to follow. It was a [distraction]. Someone is moving Force-users, gathering them, or eliminating them. The pilots, the vault—everything here is staged. We were meant to find this, meant to get drawn into the mystery while the real work happens elsewhere.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [enters the shuttle, breathless] Ryn, lift off immediately. Full burn. [collapses into a seat] The temple was a staging ground. Someone with Force training raided the vault weeks ago. The pilots were bait—or warnings. And this [holds up the kyber fragment] is a tracking device. They wanted us to find it, wanted us to take it. We're carrying the beacon for whoever's hunting Force-users across the Outer Rim.
new_scene_name: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
new_scene_description: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.
current_scene_name_before: Vast circular archive chamber with crystal pillars
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex steps into a colossal circular chamber. Towering crystal pillars rise from the floor, their surfaces glowing faintly, disappearing into shadow high above. The air hums with latent energy. She stands at the threshold, the artifact in her satchel pulsing in rhythm with the chamber.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [stands, resolve hardening in her pale eyes] There are others. Archives keepers like me, scattered across the Rim. Researchers who study the Purge. Force-sensitives in hiding. If this Master left a message in kyber, there are people who need to know. We find a secure station, we send encrypted word. We build a network the hunters can't infiltrate. This fragment becomes protection, not a target.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [Kaelen steps forward, eyes scanning the arena with practiced precision.] The dance continues. I've watched the patterns—hesitation followed by overextension. In my line of work, predictability is a death sentence. The strongest players aren't the ones who move fastest; they're the ones who see three moves ahead. [A measured smile crosses their face.] Time to remind everyone why information is the deadliest weapon.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Kaelen Voss
line_text: [Kaelen leans back, one hand resting against the worn fabric of an old chair.] You know what separates the living from the dead in intelligence work? It's not strength. It's adaptability. The moment you stop adjusting, you're already gone. [Eyes narrow.] I wonder which of us will figure that out first.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [sits back in the pilot's cabin, watching stars streak past] The safe house on Cassus Prime should have supplies and a secure comm array. Three jumps, if we're careful about the routes. [looks at each of them in turn] Once we're there, we move deliberately. Every contact could compromise us. Every message could draw them closer. But we're not running anymore. We're building.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [pulls back, cradling the kyber fragment once more] The Archives used to say that knowledge without action is just dust on a shelf. We won't be dust. We won't hide like she did. [settles into the viewport seat, watching hyperspace] Three jumps to Cassus Prime. Time to rest. Time to plan. The real work starts when we land.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: Sera, whoever sent those pilots—they knew about the temple. They knew about the vault. [grips the edge of the cabin] They know about Cassus Prime too. Safe houses don't stay safe when someone's already inside the system. We're not heading to shelter. We're heading to a trap.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex's eyes open fully, the amber glow now steady and certain] And me. She's calling me too. The crystal won't open for Sera alone. It needs both of us. [steps toward Sera] I was never meant to just survive this, was I? That's not why the signal pulled me here.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex's eyes snap open, amber blazing] Ryn—hyperspace rupture, starboard aft! [grabs the nearest support as the kyber fragment flares with light] They're here. The hunters just dropped out of lightspeed. First jump point—we're not going to make it.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Vex Nereus
line_text: [Vex crosses the cabin and reaches for Sera's hand, the one holding the kyber fragment] Whatever happens next—we do it together. The crystal, the door, the Master, all of it. [his scarred fingers close around hers, amber eyes meeting her luminescent gaze] I'm not afraid anymore.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: The silence of these past days has been heavy. I wondered if we were forgotten, left behind in the wreckage of revelation. But the Force does not forget its children, even those who stumble in darkness. The network we began—the connections we forged—they are not broken. They endure. And we endure. I can feel it, like a distant star guiding through the void. We will speak again when the time is right.
current_scene_name_before: Shuttle cockpit, immediately after lift-off
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stumbles into the cramped shuttle cockpit, breathless, and collapses into a seat. The engines hum as Ryn prepares for launch. The kyber fragment in her satchel pulses ominously.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text:
[The ground splits wider—the fault opens like a mouth. Sera steadies herself, eyes locked on Jorath as the tremor continues. But there: in the widening rift, a flicker of pale blue. The same frequency as the crystal she holds.]

Not just buried. Calling. [She steps toward the edge with sudden certainty] Your family didn't hide one beacon, Jorath. Dozens. And the earthquake is opening them all right now.
new_scene_name: Cracked canyon floor, earthquake splitting the ground
new_scene_description: The ground trembles violently as a deep fissure tears open the canyon floor. Sera Vex stands at the edge, staring into the rift where a pale blue light flickers from below. Dust and debris rain down around them.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [Sera steps toward the widening rift, eyes fixed on the pale blue flicker emerging from the depths—the same frequency as her crystal. She turns to Jorath with sudden clarity.] Not buried. Calling. Your family hid dozens of beacons, and the earthquake is opening them all right now.
current_scene_name_before: Cracked canyon floor, earthquake splitting the ground
current_scene_description_before: The ground trembles violently as a deep fissure tears open the canyon floor. Sera Vex stands at the edge, staring into the rift where a pale blue light flickers from below. Dust and debris rain down around them.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [The ground splits wider. Sera steadies herself, watching the pale blue flicker emerge from the rift—the same frequency as her crystal.] Not buried. Calling. Your family hid dozens of beacons. The earthquake is opening them now.
current_scene_name_before: Cracked canyon floor, earthquake splitting the ground
current_scene_description_before: The ground trembles violently as a deep fissure tears open the canyon floor. Sera Vex stands at the edge, staring into the rift where a pale blue light flickers from below. Dust and debris rain down around them.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [Sera turns from the rift and walks back toward the cantina, toward the others. Her decision is made.] Jorath, you can stand there holding your family's shame, or you can come help me find what they were protecting before it's gone forever. But I'm not waiting. Vex, Kaelen—gather what you need. We go down.
current_scene_name_before: Cracked canyon floor, earthquake splitting the ground
current_scene_description_before: The ground trembles violently as a deep fissure tears open the canyon floor. Sera Vex stands at the edge, staring into the rift where a pale blue light flickers from below. Dust and debris rain down around them.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [The earth groans. Sera reaches the mouth of the temple entrance—it trembles, dust falling from the carved frame. She does not hesitate. The kyber fragment burns against her chest, pulling her downward like a compass. She steps into the darkness.] Come or do not. But the signal won't wait, and neither will I.
new_scene_name: Temple entrance, trembling with dust, leading into darkness
new_scene_description: Sera Vex stands at the mouth of a stone temple entrance carved into the canyon wall. The frame trembles, dust falling from above. A pale blue light from the kyber fragment on her chest illuminates the dark corridor ahead. She steps over the threshold into the shadows.
current_scene_name_before: Cracked canyon floor, earthquake splitting the ground
current_scene_description_before: The ground trembles violently as a deep fissure tears open the canyon floor. Sera Vex stands at the edge, staring into the rift where a pale blue light flickers from below. Dust and debris rain down around them.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [Sera steps to the nearest beacon and presses the kyber fragment against its base. Light blooms—pale blue, spreading through the circle of beacons like ripples on water. They awaken. The chamber fills with a low harmonic hum, and at the throne, the skeleton's robes begin to glow with the same ancient symbols.] It knows what it was carrying. And it's been waiting for someone to understand.
new_scene_name: Inner chamber, beacons awakening around a glowing throne
new_scene_description: Sera Vex stands at the center of a circular chamber lined with dormant beacons. She presses the kyber fragment against the nearest beacon, and pale blue light ripples outward, awakening each in turn. The room fills with a low harmonic hum. At the far end, a stone throne holds a skeleton whose robes now glow with ancient symbols, matching the light from the beacons.
current_scene_name_before: Temple entrance, trembling with dust, leading into darkness
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stands at the mouth of a stone temple entrance carved into the canyon wall. The frame trembles, dust falling from above. A pale blue light from the kyber fragment on her chest illuminates the dark corridor ahead. She steps over the threshold into the shadows.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [Jorath steps closer to the beacon circle, his face carved with conflict. He looks at the remains in the throne. Recognition dawns.] That is... that was... He swallows. My grandfather. [Sera watches his hands shake] Thirty years he kept quiet to protect a skeleton. What was he protecting from? Not the dead. [She tilts her head] The living. Someone is still looking for this.
current_scene_name_before: Inner chamber, beacons awakening around a glowing throne
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stands at the center of a circular chamber lined with dormant beacons. She presses the kyber fragment against the nearest beacon, and pale blue light ripples outward, awakening each in turn. The room fills with a low harmonic hum. At the far end, a stone throne holds a skeleton whose robes now glow with ancient symbols, matching the light from the beacons.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [A sound—distant, but drawing closer. Engines. Multiple. The earthquake has subsided, but the sky above the temple mouth flickers with incoming ships.] No. Jorath moves to the chamber entrance, his voice hollow. My family always said if the beacons woke, they would know. They would come. [Sera feels the kyber pulse faster, responding to the approaching threat] We have minutes. The hunters have found us.
current_scene_name_before: Inner chamber, beacons awakening around a glowing throne
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stands at the center of a circular chamber lined with dormant beacons. She presses the kyber fragment against the nearest beacon, and pale blue light ripples outward, awakening each in turn. The room fills with a low harmonic hum. At the far end, a stone throne holds a skeleton whose robes now glow with ancient symbols, matching the light from the beacons.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [The temple entrance floods with light. Boots on stone. Sera stands before the beacon circle, kyber fragment still glowing, as soldiers in unmarked armor descend into the chamber. The captain stops, helmet reflecting the beacon light.] Stand down. That system is classified. Sera does not move. It was. Not anymore. [She holds his gaze] Your orders just became obsolete.
new_scene_name: Temple entrance, soldiers descending into beacon chamber
new_scene_description: The temple entrance floods with harsh light. Boots echo on stone as soldiers in unmarked armor descend into the chamber. The captain halts, his helmet visor reflecting the pale blue beacon glow. Sera stands motionless before the circle of awakened beacons, the kyber fragment still glowing in her hand.
current_scene_name_before: Inner chamber, beacons awakening around a glowing throne
current_scene_description_before: Sera Vex stands at the center of a circular chamber lined with dormant beacons. She presses the kyber fragment against the nearest beacon, and pale blue light ripples outward, awakening each in turn. The room fills with a low harmonic hum. At the far end, a stone throne holds a skeleton whose robes now glow with ancient symbols, matching the light from the beacons.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [The soldiers file out. Silence falls over the chamber. Vex stands beside Sera, Kaelen still recording, Jorath kneeling before his grandfather remains. The kyber fragment has dimmed, but not gone dark.] What happens now? Vex asks quietly. Sera looks at the beacon circle, at the outgoing signal that will never stop. Now we live with what we chose. And the galaxy learns what it was always meant to know.
current_scene_name_before: Temple entrance, soldiers descending into beacon chamber
current_scene_description_before: The temple entrance floods with harsh light. Boots echo on stone as soldiers in unmarked armor descend into the chamber. The captain halts, his helmet visor reflecting the pale blue beacon glow. Sera stands motionless before the circle of awakened beacons, the kyber fragment still glowing in her hand.

speaker: Sera Vex
line_text: [They emerge into the desert light. The sky is clear now, the earthquake long past. Sera stands at the temple mouth and breathes deep, the kyber fragment still warm at her chest. Behind her, the beacon chamber continues to sing its signal outward. A song that will never stop.] The burden is shared now. And that makes all the difference.
new_scene_name: Temple mouth overlooking desert, post-earthquake
